instructions:
## Project Context

elpic/templates is a blueprint template repo for containers and CI/CD workflows.

### Branch Model
| Branch | Purpose | Content |
|--------|---------|--------|
| `main` | Templates & code | `.tmpl`, `.bp`, `Dockerfile` files — the actual blueprint templates |
| `pages` | Landing page site | TanStack Start web app (`src/`, `bun.lock`, etc.) — the catalog website |
| Feature branches off `main` | Template changes | PRs target `main` |
| Feature branches off `pages` | Site changes | PRs target `pages` |

Two separate tracks with unrelated histories and independent progress.

### Paths
- **Templates repo:** `~/development/workspace/personal/templates/`
- **Actions repo:** `~/development/workspace/personal/actions/` (composite actions that templates delegate to)

### Key Rules
- `.brain/` is local-only — never tracked or pushed
- All workflow templates delegate step logic to `elpic/actions` composite actions
- `ACTIONS_VERSION` variable (default `v1`) controls which version of `elpic/actions` is used
- PRs into `pages` use feature branches based off `pages`, not `main`
- `.brain/memory.md` has detailed session memory
